sequences.name: Sequence A: Frontend-Focused UX Enhancement
sequences.description: User-facing features prioritizing UI/UX improvements, AI insights, and dashboard enhancements

issues.title: Epic #3: Navbar Restructuring
issues.rationale: Foundation work - restructure navbar before adding new features. High priority, affects entire UX.

issues.title: Epic #1: MeepleCard Enhancements
issues.rationale: Core UI component improvements. Epic 3820 completed successfully, build on that momentum.

issues.title: Frontend: AI Insights Widget Component
issues.rationale: AI insights frontend after backend (#3916) validation. Small story points = quick win.

issues.title: Frontend: Agent Builder Form & CRUD
issues.rationale: Agent system UI foundation. Medium complexity, enables user-facing agent management.

issues.title: [Integration] Unified Multi-Agent Dashboard UI
issues.rationale: Dashboard for multi-agent system. Unifies agent UX after backend agents are implemented.

issues.title: [Epic 3] Agent Builder UI
issues.rationale: Visual agent creation interface. Depends on data model (#3708) foundation.

issues.title: [Epic 3] Agent Playground
issues.rationale: Interactive testing environment. Enables users to experiment with agents after builder UI.

issues.title: [Epic 3] Strategy Editor
issues.rationale: Strategy configuration UI. Advanced feature building on agent foundation.

issues.title: [Epic 3] Visual Pipeline Builder
issues.rationale: Complex workflow builder. Large complexity, depends on playground testing environment.

issues.title: [Epic 3] Agent Catalog & Usage Stats
issues.rationale: Analytics and discovery. Full-stack feature showing agent ecosystem health.

issues.title: EntityListView - Test Coverage & Polish (Post-Epic Cleanup)
issues.rationale: Cleanup and testing. Polish existing components before moving to gamification features.

issues.title: [Editor] Game/Document Version History and Comparison UI
issues.rationale: Version control UI. Adds collaboration features for document editing.

sequences.name: Sequence B: Backend-Focused AI & Infrastructure
sequences.description: Backend services focusing on AI agents, PDF processing, infrastructure, and system reliability

issues.title: Epic #2: Agent System
issues.rationale: CRITICAL priority. Foundation for entire multi-agent system. Must be first.

issues.title: [Epic 3] AgentDefinition Data Model
issues.rationale: Database schema for agents. Foundational data model enabling all agent features.

issues.title: [Integration] Multi-Agent Orchestration & Routing System
issues.rationale: Core orchestration logic. Routes requests to appropriate agents after system foundation.

issues.title: [Integration] Agent Switching Logic & Context Preservation
issues.rationale: Context management between agents. Critical for seamless multi-agent conversations.

issues.title: Epic #4: PDF Status Tracking
issues.rationale: High priority user-facing feature. 7-state pipeline with SSE streaming, multi-location UI, ETA calculation, notifications.

issues.title: [Epic #4] Backend - PDF Processing State Machine & Error Handling
issues.rationale: Foundation: State machine with transitions validation, error categorization (transient/permanent), manual retry, automatic recovery.

issues.title: [Epic #4] Backend - SSE Progress Stream for Public PDFs
issues.rationale: Real-time streaming: Generalize PrivatePdfProgressStreamService, multi-client support, 30s heartbeat, SSE endpoint with authorization.

issues.title: [Epic #4] Backend - Processing Duration Metrics & ETA Calculation
issues.rationale: Metrics infrastructure: Historical averages (last 100 PDFs), ETA calculation with size adjustment, admin-only metrics endpoint.

issues.title: [Epic #4] Frontend - Real-time Progress UI Components
issues.rationale: Multi-location UI: ProgressModal, ProgressCard, ProgressToast, ProgressBadge. 4 locations (Modal, KB, Dashboard, Notifications).

issues.title: [Epic #4] Frontend - SSE Connection Management & Polling Fallback
issues.rationale: Connection reliability: usePdfProgress hook, exponential backoff reconnection, automatic polling fallback, connection state tracking.

issues.title: [Epic #4] Frontend - Configurable Notifications System
issues.rationale: User preferences: Toast (default), email (opt-in), push (PWA opt-in). 4 events: upload_complete, processing_complete, failed, retry_available.

issues.title: [Decisore Agent] Strategic Analysis Engine - Game State Evaluation
issues.rationale: Decisore agent core logic. Evaluates game states for strategic recommendations.

issues.title: [Decisore Agent] Move Suggestion Algorithm with Priority Ranking
issues.rationale: Decisore move suggestions. Builds on analysis engine to rank moves.

issues.title: [Decisore Agent] Game State Parser & Context Assembly
issues.rationale: Parse game state for Decisore. Data preprocessing for analysis engine.

issues.title: [Decisore Agent] REST API Endpoint - /api/v1/agents/decisore/suggest
issues.rationale: Decisore HTTP endpoint. Exposes agent capabilities via REST API.

issues.title: [Decisore Agent] Performance Tuning - <10s Target for Expert Moves
issues.rationale: Optimize Decisore performance. <10s response time for production readiness.

issues.title: Backend: AI Insights Runtime Validation (Performance + Accuracy)
issues.rationale: Validate AI insights production metrics. P95 <1s, accuracy >75%.

issues.title: [Integration] E2E Testing Suite - All Agent Workflows
issues.rationale: Comprehensive agent testing. Validates entire multi-agent system integration.

issues.title: [Arbitro Agent] Performance Benchmark Tests
issues.rationale: Arbitro performance benchmarks. Ensure agent meets latency requirements.

issues.title: [Infra] k6 Load Testing Infrastructure
issues.rationale: Load testing framework. Infrastructure for validating system under stress.

issues.title: [Infra] Log Aggregation System (Beyond Structured Logs)
issues.rationale: Advanced logging infrastructure. Observability for complex multi-agent system.

strategicGoals: Complete PDF Status Tracking with real-time SSE streaming and multi-location UI
Add configurable notifications system (toast, email, push)

analysisMetadata.sequencingStrategy: Priority-first with dependency respect, area batching, complexity balancing
analysisMetadata.recommendedApproach: Execute sequences in parallel with separate teams OR execute Sequence B first (backend foundation) then Sequence A (frontend polish)

changeLog.change: Added Epic #4071 PDF Status Tracking breakdown: 6 sub-issues (42 SP total). Backend: State Machine (#4208), SSE Stream (#4209), Metrics (#4212). Frontend: UI Components (#4210), SSE Hook (#4211), Notifications (#4213). Updated Sequence B: 82 SP, 21 issues, 7-9 weeks.
